Home / Services / Kitchen Remodeling

Kitchen Remodeling

Functional, beautiful kitchens designed for Utah's active families and entertaining needs.

Salt Lake City kitchens need to withstand busy family life while handling our unique climate conditions. We install cabinetry that won't warp in dry air, choose countertops resistant to temperature fluctuations, and design layouts perfect for both everyday meals and hosting during Sundance season.

For homes in Draper's newer developments, we create sleek modern kitchens with smart storage solutions. In Provo's university-area homes, we design durable spaces that can handle student housing demands. Every kitchen includes proper ventilation to combat winter inversion air quality issues and energy-efficient appliances to reduce utility costs in our extreme seasons.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Lifestyle assessment to understand your cooking and entertaining needs
  2. 02 Step 2: Material selection focused on durability in Utah's climate
  3. 03 Step 3: Temporary kitchen setup to minimize disruption
  4. 04 Step 4: Professional installation with attention to detail

Benefits

  • Custom storage solutions for bulk food storage common in Utah
  • Improved indoor air quality with proper range hood ventilation
  • Increased functionality for large family gatherings
  • Materials selected for easy cleaning after dusty summer months

Frequently Asked Questions

How long will I be without a kitchen?

Most projects take 4-6 weeks. We set up a temporary kitchenette with microwave, fridge, and coffee station to ease the transition.

Do you work with local suppliers?

Yes, we partner with Salt Lake cabinetmakers and stone yards for materials that perform well in our dry climate.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with kitchen remodeling? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: 555-gen-r90
